text.title: AI Generated Test Validation Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a AI Generated Test Validation deliverable. Subagent must satisfy this before returning.

forbidden.pattern: fields silently omitted (must be N/A with reason or filled)
template_version mismatched between header and footer
no worked example bundled with the template

allowed-transformations.transformation: Reorder fields only via a template_version bump.
Localize labels but keep the field key stable.
